query:
-- 删除partnerId=90006的partner_cities记录
DELETE FROM partner_cities WHERE partnerId = 90006;

-- 删除partnerId=90006的partners记录
DELETE FROM partners WHERE id = 90006;

-- 验证删除结果
SELECT 
  p.id as partnerId,
  p.userId,
  p.name as partnerName,
  pc.id as partnerCityId,
  c.name as cityName
FROM partners p
LEFT JOIN partner_cities pc ON pc.partnerId = p.id
LEFT JOIN cities c ON c.id = pc.cityId
WHERE c.name = '重庆' OR p.name LIKE '%test%'
ORDER BY p.createdAt DESC;
